description.content: Authors represent the staff users who create content in a Ghost publication.
Retrieve a paginated list of authors (staff users) for the publication. Supports including a count of posts per author using the include=count.posts parameter.

query.description: Include a count of posts associated with each author.
Comma-separated list of fields to return in the response. Use this to limit the size of the response by only requesting the fields you need.
Apply fine-grained filters using Ghost's NQL query language. Examples include featured:true, tag:getting-started, visibility:public, and combinations using plus and comma operators.
Maximum number of resources to return per page. Defaults to 15. Use all to return all resources without pagination.
Page number for paginated results. Defaults to 1.
Field and direction to order results by, for example published_at DESC or title ASC.

response.name: A list of authors
Authentication failed or API key is missing

description.content: Pages are static content resources in Ghost, similar to posts but used for standalone pages like About or Contact.
Retrieve a paginated list of published pages. Pages function similarly to posts but are used for static content. Supports the same filtering, ordering, and inclusion options as posts.

query.description: Comma-separated list of related resources to include. Supported values are authors and tags.
Comma-separated list of fields to return in the response. Use this to limit the size of the response by only requesting the fields you need.
Apply fine-grained filters using Ghost's NQL query language. Examples include featured:true, tag:getting-started, visibility:public, and combinations using plus and comma operators.
Maximum number of resources to return per page. Defaults to 15. Use all to return all resources without pagination.
Page number for paginated results. Defaults to 1.
Field and direction to order results by, for example published_at DESC or title ASC.
Comma-separated list of content formats to include. By default only html is returned. Use formats=html,plaintext to also include plaintext.

query.description: Comma-separated list of related resources to include. Supported values are authors and tags.

Comma-separated list of content formats to include. By default only html is returned. Use formats=html,plaintext to also include plaintext.

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the resource

response.name: Authentication failed or API key is missing

variable.description: (Required) The URL slug of the resource

response.name: The requested resource was not found

variable.description: (Required) The URL slug of the resource

description.content: Posts are the primary content resource in Ghost. Browse and read published posts with full support for filtering, including by tag, author, and featured status.

Retrieve a paginated list of published posts. Supports filtering by tag, author, featured status, and other fields using Ghost's NQL query language. Results can be ordered and limited, and related resources like authors and tags can be included.

query.description: Comma-separated list of related resources to include. Supported values are authors and tags.
Comma-separated list of fields to return in the response. Use this to limit the size of the response by only requesting the fields you need.
Apply fine-grained filters using Ghost's NQL query language. Examples include featured:true, tag:getting-started, visibility:public, and combinations using plus and comma operators.
Maximum number of resources to return per page. Defaults to 15. Use all to return all resources without pagination.
Page number for paginated results. Defaults to 1.
Field and direction to order results by, for example published_at DESC or title ASC.
Comma-separated list of content formats to include. By default only html is returned. Use formats=html,plaintext to also include plaintext.

response.name: A list of posts

Comma-separated list of content formats to include. By default only html is returned. Use formats=html,plaintext to also include plaintext.

description.content: Settings provide access to global publication settings including title, description, navigation, and other configuration values.
Retrieve all public settings for the Ghost publication, including title, description, logo, icon, cover image, language, timezone, navigation, and other site-wide configuration values.

description.content: Tiers represent the membership levels available for a Ghost publication, including free and paid options.

Retrieve a paginated list of membership tiers configured for the publication. Tiers define the access levels and pricing for members. Use filter=visibility:public to retrieve only publicly visible tiers.

query.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return in the response. Use this to limit the size of the response by only requesting the fields you need.
Apply fine-grained filters using Ghost's NQL query language. Examples include featured:true, tag:getting-started, visibility:public, and combinations using plus and comma operators.
Maximum number of resources to return per page. Defaults to 15. Use all to return all resources without pagination.
Page number for paginated results. Defaults to 1.
Field and direction to order results by, for example published_at DESC or title ASC.

description.content: Your Ghost site subdomain

The Ghost Content API is a RESTful, read-only API that delivers published content from a Ghost site to any client. It provides access to posts, pages, tags, authors, tiers, and settings resources. Access is controlled via a Content API key provided as a query parameter, and all responses are returned in JSON format. The API supports browse and read request types with powerful filtering using the NQL query language, making it ideal for building custom front-ends, static sites, mobile apps, and other content-driven applications powered by Ghost as a headless CMS.

Contact Support:
 Name: Ghost Foundation
